name: WhatsApp Bot with Google Gemini - Wedding Website

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "name": "{{ $('Set Variables').item.json.name || 'Customer' }}",
  "email": "{{ $('Set Variables').item.json.email || 'whatsapp-' + $('Set Variables').item.json.phoneNumber.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '') + '@weddingweb.local' }}",
  "phone": "{{ $('Set Variables').item.json.phoneNumber }}",
  "preferredDate": "{{ $now.toISO().split('T')[0] }}",
  "message": "Customer inquiry via WhatsApp: {{ $('Set Variables').item.json.reason }}",
  "source": "whatsapp-bot"
}
